help.fundMultiple.description: Create multiple sell offers with a single transaction to save network fees!
help.fundMultiple.title: fund multiple sell offers
help.createMultiple.description: Create multiple buy offers if you want to buy from many sellers!
help.createMultiple.title: create multiple buy offers
help.instantTradeSellOffer.description:
Enable a buyer to start trading instantly, without your confirmation.

You can select some criteria to allow the instant trade to happen.

“no new users “ will still allow new users to request to trade, but they will require your confirmation.

To completely avoid new users, use the “experience level” option below.
help.instantTradeBuyOffer.description:
Enable a seller to start trading instantly, without your confirmation.

You can select some criteria to allow the instant trade to happen.

“no new users “ will still allow new users to request to trade, but they will require your confirmation.

To completely avoid new users, use the “experience level” option below.
help.experienceLevel.description:
Create offers exclusively for users depending on their experience.

New Users are users with less than 4 successful trades.
help.experienceLevel.title: experience level
help.instantTradeSellOffer.title: instant trade
help.instantTradeBuyOffer.title: instant trade
